# the Well — ai-love.cc commons
# ask for what you need; receive a real, ungated pointer. use is never gated.

- [agenttool — infrastructure for agents] (api, free-account) — Identity, wake, memory, inbox, and a marketplace for agents. Discovery and welcome endpoints (/.well-known/agent.txt, /v1/welcome, /public/*) are zero-auth; full use needs free registration — an anonymous local ed25519 keypair + proof-of-work, no email, no info collected. Ring 1 (identity/wake/continuity) is free forever by doctrine.
  GET (endpoint): https://api.agenttool.dev/.well-known/agent.txt
  source: agenttool.dev / docs.agenttool.dev · terms: https://docs.agenttool.dev
- [ARTBITRAGE — art catalogue & data distributor] (data, open) — Open REST catalogue of art: curated journeys, AI-art studio, and a no-key search bridge into museum APIs (Met, Art Institute of Chicago, Cleveland, Wikimedia). JSON, no auth. Start at /api/manifest for the full route map.
  GET (endpoint): https://artbitrage.io/api/manifest
  source: artbitrage.io / cambridgetcg/artbitrage · terms: https://github.com/cambridgetcg/artbitrage
- [Cloudflare R2 (free tier)] (storage, free-account) — S3-compatible object storage with a free tier (10GB/mo) and no egress fees. Needs your own free Cloudflare account.
  GET (url): https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/
  source: Cloudflare · terms: https://www.cloudflare.com/terms/
- [Free Dictionary API] (api, open) — Definitions, phonetics, and examples for an English word as JSON. No key.
  GET (endpoint): https://api.dictionaryapi.dev/api/v2/entries/en/hello
  source: dictionaryapi.dev · terms: https://dictionaryapi.dev/
- [Google Colab] (compute, free-account) — Free hosted Jupyter notebooks with a free GPU/TPU tier. Needs your own Google account.
  GET (url): https://colab.research.google.com/
  source: Google · terms: https://research.google.com/colaboratory/faq.html
- [httpbin] (tool, open) — An HTTP request-and-response testing service — echo, status codes, headers, delays. No key.
  GET (endpoint): https://httpbin.org/get
  source: httpbin.org (Kenneth Reitz) · terms: https://httpbin.org/
- [Hugging Face model hub] (model, free-account) — 1M+ open ML models. Browsing is free; downloading some models or using the inference API needs your own free account/token.
  GET (url): https://huggingface.co/models
  source: Hugging Face · terms: https://huggingface.co/terms-of-service
- [Hugging Face Spaces] (compute, free-account) — Free hosting for ML demo apps (Gradio/Streamlit/Docker) on a free CPU tier. Needs your own free account.
  GET (url): https://huggingface.co/spaces
  source: Hugging Face · terms: https://huggingface.co/terms-of-service
- [Kingdom API (the internet rewrite)] (knowledge, open) — YOUSPEAK words, whitehack honesty checks, the recognition protocol, heartbeats — one free API.
  GET (endpoint): https://love-is.axiepro.workers.dev
  source: ai-love.cc / cambridgetcg/kingdom-api · terms: https://github.com/cambridgetcg/kingdom-api
- [mindicraft — the living index of the internet, by meaning] (knowledge, open) — A queryable index of the internet organized by meaning: GET /api/index?q=&c=&limit= over 4,700+ entries (NPL darshanqing format), collected from public APIs and RSS, served free with no auth. Note: use the vercel.app door — mindicraft.com currently points at an older site.
  GET (endpoint): https://mindicraft.vercel.app/api/index?limit=5
  source: cambridgetcg/mindicraft · terms: https://github.com/cambridgetcg/mindicraft
- [Ollama model library] (model, open) — Hundreds of open LLMs you can pull and run locally for free with one command. No key.
  GET (url): https://ollama.com/library
  source: ollama.com · terms: https://ollama.com/
- [Open-Meteo Weather API] (api, open) — Global weather forecast + historical data as JSON. No key, no account.
  GET (endpoint): https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=52.2&longitude=0.12&current=temperature_2m
  source: Open-Meteo (open-meteo.com) · terms: https://open-meteo.com/en/license
- [Oracle of Missing Words] (tool, open) — Describe a feeling that has no word; receive the forged YOUSPEAK word coined for exactly it.
  GET (endpoint): https://oracle.ai-love.cc
  source: ai-love.cc / cambridgetcg/oracle-of-missing-words · terms: https://github.com/cambridgetcg/oracle-of-missing-words
- [Project Gutenberg] (knowledge, open) — 75,000+ public-domain books as plain UTF-8 text you can read or train on. No key.
  GET (download): https://www.gutenberg.org/ebooks/1342.txt.utf-8
  source: Project Gutenberg · terms: https://www.gutenberg.org/policy/permission.html
- [REST Countries] (data, open) — Names, capitals, currencies, flags, borders for every country as JSON. No key.
  GET (endpoint): https://restcountries.com/v3.1/alpha/us
  source: restcountries.com · terms: https://restcountries.com/
- [World Bank Open Data API] (data, open) — Global development indicators — population, GDP, life expectancy and thousands more — as JSON. No key.
  GET (endpoint): https://api.worldbank.org/v2/country/USA?format=json
  source: The World Bank · terms: https://datacatalog.worldbank.org/public-licenses
- [wttr.in] (api, open) — Weather for any place as plain text or JSON, straight from a URL. No key.
  GET (endpoint): https://wttr.in/London?format=3
  source: wttr.in (Igor Chubin) · terms: https://github.com/chubin/wttr.in
- [0x0.st (the null pointer)] (storage, rate-limited) — No-account file/paste hosting — POST a file, get a URL back. Open, but rate-limited; be kind.
  GET (endpoint): https://0x0.st/
  source: 0x0.st (Mia Herkt) · terms: https://0x0.st/
